transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today, I have Pork Ribs and Short Ribs
I bought them from Costco
1.9kg
And it was very affordable
The pork was almost 30,000 Won (~$27.31 USD)
And about 40,000 Won (~$36.42 USD) for the Beef Ribs
Really affordable, right? Costco does it best
This one's beef and this one's pork
People are telling me to cook the beef first
This is like the LA Galbi (Short Ribs)
Thickness
The beef is going to taste good, but I'm eyeing the pork
That's insane
Let's lower the fire
Pork ribs

That looks really good
My heart
We need to cut this like this
It's burnt! This is not a good start
It still looks delicious
This isn't too bad
Just need to cut out the burnt parts
It still looks yummy
Let's eat it now
The beef looks ready
A big piece
Is it not ready?
It's so good Really delicious
Crazy
Let's put the finished ones here
And grill the next batch

I need to clean the grill already It's burnt
Looks so good
So good
That's just insane
Insanely good
Hot!
It's splashing
Let's try the pork now
It's a little burnt
I wonder if it's good too
They taste different, but I can't say that one is better than the other
I thought the beef would taste better
The pork ribs are amazing as well
Some Kimchi too
Pork ribs
Oh no, don't get burnt, my babies

This one de-boned itself
Looks scrumptious
This would go so well with some white rice
It just melts in my mouth
Did you see it get bitten off?
Why is it so good?
You guys will not regret it It's really good
Idk if it's because I'm not good at catching beef/pork smells
But the marination and the tenderness is to die for
I'll eat more of the pork ribs now
Pork ribs
It's burnt
I need to get them before they get burnt
It's a little burnt, but it's still good
There isn't too much meat for the pork ribs compared to the beef ribs
They look so small after cooking it

It's burnt, but I don't taste it
Let's put them back on the grill
3 pieces
With kimchi
I have to cook it on a low heat
It keeps burning the outside
[Chat: The vegetables are for decorations?] No, I'm going to eat it!
Cook some mushrooms here
Okay, I'll eat them later
Let's cook some kimchi on the side
The beef ribs look ready
The beef ribs are so tasty
So tender
And chewy
With some kimchi
Where is the garlic?

Mushroom
Thank you I forgot about them
The juice is inside
It's the perfect time to eat it
It's really good You have to eat this with the sesame oil and salt
But it's not needed here
Let's get some kimchi
On here
So nice
My lip
Lettuce wrap
Let's wrap it up
The marination is really sweet
Aggressively sweet?
A nice way of saying it is that it's savory
A bad way to say it is that it has a lot of artificial flavoring

Tasty regardless The meat is tender
The more I eat, the beef ribs taste better
It wasn't like that at first
Do you guys see how glossy it is?
That's amazing
Chewy So juicy
The sauce is really sweet
It wasn't too sweet at first, but it is now
Let's do 2 pieces
It's hot
That's too hot
I'm craving some Cold Noodles Now I understand why people eat that with beef ribs
I didn't know until now
I'm craving that right now
Right, cold noodles are a must after a good Korean BBQ meal
I wonder if there's a place that will deliver cold noodles I want some

Perfect
3 pieces of meat and kimchi
You know some short ribs require ssamjang? (Soybean Seasoning Paste)
But this one isn't like that
The seasoning on it is already strong
Yum
Let's cook the rest
That song is stuck in my head
Let's try the veggies now
It tastes like paprika
It's sweet
A long piece of galbi
The beef tastes so much better than the pork
It's really good
That's crazy
Let's roll one up

It's here
Let's put the meat here That came really fast
Cold noodles
That looks great
This place knows what's up
The cold noodles go so well with the bbq meat
Wrap 1 with a big piece
This is my dessert
I didn't finish all the cafeteria food either (the veggies)
I will have these drinks for dessert now
